shots.prompt: A single seed of light bursts into a colossal fractal flower, petals blooming recursively into more flowers, hyper-saturated neon botanicals breathing and morphing. Satisfying, seamless, vivid.
An entire garden of impossible glowing plants growing in fast-motion, vines spiraling into sacred geometry, kaleidoscopic symmetry pulsing with bioluminescent color. Mesmerizing, fluid.
Flowers melt into butterflies of liquid stained glass that scatter into fractal mandalas, folding and unfolding endlessly across the frame. Dreamlike, hypnotic.
Camera zooms infinitely into the heart of a glowing bloom, petals becoming galaxies becoming petals, recursive and breathing, dissolving into warm light. Smooth infinite recursion.
